name: Onibimon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Blows bluish-white sparks from its mouth.

description: A Ghost Digimon that has an appearance resembling a small spirit. As one can see from its appearance, it is able to pass through objects as if it were a ghost. In the Eastern Digital World , Onibimon are believed to be the reincarnated forms of Digimon who have died of natural causes that have passed through the world of Yomi . Its Signature Move is blowing bluish-white sparks from its mouth ( Rinka ).
